plugins.name: rhost-vision
plugins.description: Rhost-style display — look, who, page, score, examine, inventory, +finger, +where, +staff

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Webhook-based Discord integration — jobs, channels, presence, and chargen events

plugins.name: jobs
plugins.description: Anomaly-style jobs/request system — player requests, staff commands, bucket access, archive, REST API

plugins.name: events
plugins.description: In-game event calendar with RSVP tracking and REST API

plugins.name: bbs
plugins.description: Full-featured Myrddin-style BBS — boards, threading, categories, IC/OOC tags, sticky posts, moderation, Discord webhooks, and scene linking.

plugins.name: wiki
plugins.description: File-based markdown wiki — pages, search, history, access control, backlinks, and Discord webhooks.

plugins.name: mail
plugins.description: In-game mail system — drafts, reply/forward, folders, attachments, quota, expiry, and REST API.

plugins.name: builder
plugins.description: World-building commands (@dig, @open, @link, @describe, @examine, and more) plus REST API at /api/v1/building/*.
